title: Ransom Note
description:
Given two strings `ransomNote` and `magazine`, return `true` if `ransomNote`
can be constructed using the letters from `magazine`. Each letter in `magazine`
can be used **at most once**.
constraints: Both consist of lowercase English letters.

solutions.summary: Count magazine letters, then spend them against the note.

steps.title: Count the magazine letters
steps.explanation: Build a map of how many of each letter the magazine offers.

steps.title: Spend a letter per note character
steps.explanation: For each character of the note, decrement its count; if none remain, building is impossible.
